operations.title: 弹性文件信息查询（基于sfsUID＋regionID）

description.en-GB: Retrieve an SFS file system by ID. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:get. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.en-US: Retrieve an SFS file system by ID. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:get. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.zh-CN:
弹性文件信息查询（基于sfsUID＋regionID）。 1.在2024年10月之后，弹性文件将支持VPCE终端节点服务接入，按资源池维度陆续上线，新建的文件系统默认支持VPCE。在弹性文件服务有关挂载地址的查询接口中将增加"vpceSharePath"字段，用于展示文件系统下每个VPC的挂载地址
· 原挂载地址相关字段无改动，云主机、容器用户无须适配新字段
· 若为物理机（标准裸金属）用户，须使用"vpceSharePath"字段中的挂载地址
· 该字段仅适用于可用区资源池，即使用资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，即可使用
2.自2024年10月15日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:shares:get"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: Increase an SFS file system's capacity. SFS supports expansion only, not shrinking. Total capacity remains subject to the default 50 TB account quota and the default ten-file-system regional quota. Shanghai 7, Nanjing 3, and Chengdu 4 support only 500 GB, 1 TB, 2 TB, 3 TB, 5 TB, 10 TB, 20 TB, or 30 TB sizes. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:update.

Total capacity remains subject to the default 50 TB account quota and the default ten-file-system regional quota. Shanghai 7, Nanjing 3, and Chengdu 4 support only 500 GB, 1 TB, 2 TB, 3 TB, 5 TB, 10 TB, 20 TB, or 30 TB sizes. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:update.
description.zh-CN:
扩容文件系统。 1.弹性文件只支持扩容，不支持缩容
2.修改弹性文件大小为sfsSize后，所有弹性文件总大小不超过用户配额50TB
3.单用户单地域文件系统数量配额默认10个，容量配额默认为50TB
4.上海7、南京3、成都4等资源池仅支持500GB、1TB、2TB、3TB、5TB、10TB、20TB、30TB等固定规格，弹性文件服务支持的资源池请参考产品能力地图
5.自2024年10月15日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:shares:update"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: Create one or more SFS file systems. The VPC and subnet must be available, the region must support the selected storage type, and encrypted creation requires an available symmetric KMS key. Capacity defaults to 500-32768 GB and account quota defaults to 50 TB. Subscription creation requires cycle count and type with a maximum term of three years. 4.0 resource pools bind the default permission group automatically. Shanghai 7, Nanjing 3, and Chengdu 4 support only 500 GB, 1 TB, 2 TB, 3 TB, 5 TB, 10 TB, 20 TB, or 30 TB sizes. azName is equivalent to zoneName, and the portal identifies azName as the canonical field. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:create.
description.en-US: Create one or more SFS file systems. The VPC and subnet must be available, the region must support the selected storage type, and encrypted creation requires an available symmetric KMS key. Capacity defaults to 500-32768 GB and account quota defaults to 50 TB. Subscription creation requires cycle count and type with a maximum term of three years. 4.0 resource pools bind the default permission group automatically. Shanghai 7, Nanjing 3, and Chengdu 4 support only 500 GB, 1 TB, 2 TB, 3 TB, 5 TB, 10 TB, 20 TB, or 30 TB sizes. azName is equivalent to zoneName, and the portal identifies azName as the canonical field. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:create.
description.zh-CN:
创建文件系统。 1.用户VPC/subnet资源可用
2.regionID资源池支持sfsType类型的弹性文件
3.如若使用isEncrypt加密，用户kmsUUID资源可用,仅支持对称加密密钥，具体请参考加密
4.底层集群剩余可用空间大于sfsSize，sfsSize大小区间默认为[500GB, 32768GB]
5.用户配额大小默认为50TB
6.onDemand 为 false 时必须指定cycleCount。cycleCount周期最大长度不能超过 3 年
7.资源池信息为"regionVersion": "v4.0"时，新开通的文件系统会自动绑定默认权限组
8.上海7、南京3、成都4等3个资源池仅支持500GB、1TB、2TB、3TB、5TB、10TB、20TB、30TB等固定规格，弹性文件服务支持的资源池请参考产品能力地图
9.自2024年10月15日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:shares:create"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: List SFS file systems opened by the tenant. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.en-US: List SFS file systems opened by the tenant. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.zh-CN:
查询租户已开通文件系统列表。 1.在2024年10月之后，弹性文件将支持VPCE终端节点服务接入，按资源池维度陆续上线，新建的文件系统默认支持VPCE。在弹性文件服务有关挂载地址的查询接口中将增加"vpceSharePath"字段，用于展示文件系统下每个VPC的挂载地址
· 原挂载地址相关字段无改动，云主机、容器用户无须适配新字段
· 若为物理机（标准裸金属）用户，须使用vpceSharePath字段中的挂载地址
· 该字段仅适用于可用区资源池，即使用资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，即可使用
2.自2025年1月10日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:shares:list"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.zh-CN:
添加挂载点。 1.当前接口使用前需通过资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v3.0"，即可使用；如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，则不可使用
2.每个文件系统最多添加20个挂载点，只支持添加单个挂载点
3.自2024年10月15日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:vpcs:bind"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: List SFS file systems by protocol. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.en-US: List SFS file systems by protocol. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:shares:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.zh-CN:
查询指定协议类型的文件系统列表。 1.在2024年10月之后，弹性文件将支持VPCE终端节点服务接入，按资源池维度陆续上线，新建的文件系统默认支持VPCE。在弹性文件服务有关挂载地址的查询接口中将增加"vpceSharePath"字段，用于展示文件系统下每个VPC的挂载地址
· 原挂载地址相关字段无改动，云主机、容器用户无须适配新字段
· 若为物理机（标准裸金属）用户，须使用"vpceSharePath"字段中的挂载地址
· 该字段仅适用于可用区资源池，即使用资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，即可使用
2.自2025年1月10日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:shares:list"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: List SFS file systems by storage type. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.en-US: List SFS file systems by storage type. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.zh-CN:
查询指定存储类型的文件系统列表。 在2024年10月之后，弹性文件将支持VPCE终端节点服务接入，按资源池维度陆续上线，新建的文件系统默认支持VPCE。在弹性文件服务有关挂载地址的查询接口中将增加"vpceSharePath"字段，用于展示文件系统下每个VPC的挂载地址
· 原挂载地址相关字段无改动，云主机、容器用户无须适配新字段
· 若为物理机（标准裸金属）用户，须使用vpceSharePath字段中的挂载地址
· 该字段仅适用于可用区资源池，即使用资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，即可使用

description.en-GB: List SFS file systems in a VPC. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:fsInVpc:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.en-US: List SFS file systems in a VPC. Calling as an IAM subaccount or delegated identity requires sfs:fsInVpc:list. VPCE share paths are exposed for 4.0 availability-zone resource pools; standard bare-metal clients must use the VPCE share path, while existing VM and container mount fields are unchanged.
description.zh-CN:
查询租户指定VPC下的文件系统列表。 1.在2024年10月之后，弹性文件将支持VPCE终端节点服务接入，按资源池维度陆续上线，新建的文件系统默认支持VPCE。在弹性文件服务有关挂载地址的查询接口中将增加"vpceSharePath"字段，用于展示文件系统下每个VPC的挂载地址
· 原挂载地址相关字段无改动，云主机、容器用户无须适配新字段
· 若为物理机（标准裸金属）用户，须使用"vpceSharePath"字段中的挂载地址
· 该字段仅适用于可用区资源池，即使用资源池概况信息查询接口查询对应的资源池信息，如资源池信息"regionVersion": "v4.0"，即可使用
2.自2024年11月15日起，本接口会受到IAM权限管控，当子账号或委托调用该接口时，需具备"sfs:fsInVpc:list"权限，否则会报权限不足的错误

description.en-GB: Create cross-region replication between two SFS file systems. Replication is supported only between Southwest 1 AZ1 and North China 2 AZ1, between existing available file systems in different resource pools with the same storage and protocol types. The destination must have overwrite protection disabled; read-only destination permission rules reduce the risk of replicated data overwriting concurrent writes. This trial is limited to whitelisted users.
description.en-US: Create cross-region replication between two SFS file systems. Replication is supported only between Southwest 1 AZ1 and North China 2 AZ1, between existing available file systems in different resource pools with the same storage and protocol types. The destination must have overwrite protection disabled; read-only destination permission rules reduce the risk of replicated data overwriting concurrent writes. This trial is limited to whitelisted users.
description.zh-CN:
创建跨域复制。 1.仅西南1可用区1与华北2可用区 1之间支持跨域复制功能
2.仅支持复制到已有文件系统，无法在创建复制时新建文件系统
3.仅“可用”状态的文件系统支持创建复制
4.仅支持跨资源池的复制，不支持同资源池的复制
5.源文件系统和目标文件系统须为同种存储类型，如同为标准型或同为性能型
6.源文件系统和目标文件系统须为同种协议类型，如同为NFS或同为CIFS
7.用作复制目标的文件系统必须“禁用”复制覆盖保护
8.将目标文件系统的权限组规则设置为“只读”可降低覆盖数据的风险，避免同时写入的数据被复制过来的数据覆盖，造成数据丢失
9.本功能目前面向白名单用户开放试用，如须试用本功能，请提交业务工单进行评估

description.en-GB: Bind or unbind labels on an SFS file system. Only existing file systems can be labelled, with a one-to-two-minute wait after creation. Each file system supports at most 50 labels, keys must be unique per resource and request, an existing key updates its value, and missing account labels are created. Label management is available only in selected resource pools; consult the product capability map.
description.en-US: Bind or unbind labels on an SFS file system. Only existing file systems can be labelled, with a one-to-two-minute wait after creation. Each file system supports at most 50 labels, keys must be unique per resource and request, an existing key updates its value, and missing account labels are created. Label management is available only in selected resource pools; consult the product capability map.
description.zh-CN:
为文件系统绑定或解绑标签。 1.只能为已创建的文件系统绑定标签，刚创建的文件系统需要等待1-2分钟后才能绑定标签
2.单个实例最多添加50个标签
3.每个资源下的标签键是唯一的，不可绑定相同标签键。 如果尝试添加已有标签键，则对应的标签值会更新为新值。 例如：某资源先绑定了 city:shanghai，后续如果绑定city:newwork，则city:shanghai自动被解绑；修改标签键等同于解绑旧标签键值的同时绑定新标签键
4.当输入的是当前账号下不存在的标签时，将创建新的标签并为实例绑定
5.在一次请求中，不允许出现相同的标签键
6.当前仅部分资源池支持使用标签管理功能，具体参见产品能力地图
